chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-514 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A.No.8977/2024. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A.No.8978/2024. 4. For hearing of main case. 28.08.2024 None present no any intimation received. In the interest of justice by granting urgency application the matter is taken-up for hearing. The impugned order dated 23.07.2024 is perused. It appears that the learned Trial Court has granted bail to accused after assigning cogent reasons in its para-6 which is reproduced as under: “6- The record reflects that alleged offence committed by nominated accused persons on 22.06.2024 at about 2245 hours and matter was reported on 22.06.2024 at about 2345 hours with delay of somehow hours, however there were injuries but complainant brother Mehboob, as per FIR the complainant and naveed purchased the instruments of qurbani animals jointly and later on it converted into enmity hence, it is admitted fact therefore, it will be decided later that who was first aggressor same will be decided at the time of trial.” No infirmity or illegality is found in the impugned order and the same does not require interference of this Court therefore instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application being devoid of merits is dismissed in limine. JUDGE Muhammad Danish *
